name: maze of caves
description: I'm in a maze of caves
hints: This is a confusing cave maze. Map carefully as you explore.
DOWN leads to a pit with crocodiles. Be careful! SOUTH, EAST, and WEST lead to other maze rooms.
Go WEST to eventually reach the hill and island surface. DOWN to the pit requires preparation for crocodiles.
Navigate: SOUTH to room 12, EAST to room 13, WEST to room 14 (exit to hill). DOWN to crocodile pit (room 11).
notes: Cave maze junction room. DOWN leads to the crocodile pit (room 11). WEST leads toward the island surface via room 14. Map this maze carefully.
